title: cyathocalyx deltoideus
intro: Cyathocalyx deltoideus, also known as the Burmese mangosteen, is a species of plant that belongs to the family Annonaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Cyathocalyx deltoideus include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating various infections. Herbal preparations of Cyathocalyx deltoideus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
